summary: Comprehensive testing of AJPL Calculator iteration 9 bug fixes. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all 9 user-reported issues are fixed.
passed_tests: Issue #1: MRP items editable - Edit button visible on BillPage for MRP items, route /bill/:billId/edit-mrp/:itemIndex works
Issue #2: Full bill details in summary - GET /api/bills/{id}/summary returns gold_value, total_making, making_charges breakdown, MRP details
Issue #3: Admin can see pending bills - Bill tabs (Pending/Approved/Draft/All) visible on AdminDashboard
Issue #3: Admin can approve bills - Approve buttons visible for sent/edited bills, PUT /api/bills/{id}/approve works
Issue #4: Back button navigation - goHome() function navigates to role-specific home (admin/manager/sales), not browser.back() loop
Issue #5: Complete calculations in print/PDF - BillPrintView shows Items Total, GST, Subtotal, Grand Total
Issue #6: Customer tier calculations from actual bills - GET /api/analytics/customers/frequency calculates spending tiers from actual bills
Issue #7: Phone 10-digit validation - SalesExecDashboard validates customerPhone.length === 10, shows 'Phone Number * (10 digits)' label
Issue #8: Photo removal - DELETE /api/bills/{bill_id}/items/{item_index}/photos/{photo_index} endpoint works
Issue #9: MRP items show MRP/Discount in print - BillPrintView displays MRP value and Discount for MRP items instead of Rate/10g and Gold Value
Multi-bill tabs for executives - Multi-bill tab bar shows on SalesExecDashboard when draft bills exist
Bill approval workflow - Full flow: create draft, send to manager (status=sent), approve (status=approved)
critical_code_review_comments: All 9 user-reported issues have been properly addressed in the code
goHome() function in BillPage.js correctly routes based on user.role
Phone validation in SalesExecDashboard enforces 10 digits with clear label
MRP item edit route added in App.js and BillPage.js handles MRP items correctly
Summary endpoint returns full item details including making_charges breakdown
Photo removal endpoint properly updates bill and returns updated data
BillPrintView shows MRP/Discount labels for MRP items as requested

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 9 issue fixes verified via UI testing)

admin.method: Admin Login link on login page

executive.method: OTP flow - request OTP, get from admin dashboard

seed_data_creation: Created test executive 'test_exec_iter9' for testing executive flows
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 user-reported issues verified fixed: 1) MRP edit button visible with route /bill/:billId/edit-mrp/:itemIndex, 2) Summary endpoint returns full details including making_charges, 3) Admin dashboard has bill tabs (Pending/Approved/Draft/All) with approve buttons, 4) Back button uses goHome() for role-specific navigation, 5) Print view shows complete calculations, 6) Customer frequency calculates from actual bills, 7) Phone input validates 10 digits, 8) Photo removal endpoint works, 9) MRP items show MRP/Discount in print. Multi-tab billing UI also working.

verified_fixes.issue_1_mrp_edit: BillPage.js line 161: navigates to /bill/{billId}/edit-mrp/{idx} for MRP items
verified_fixes.issue_2_full_details: server.py get_bill_summary returns gold_value, total_making, making_charges
verified_fixes.issue_3_admin_approve: AdminDashboard.js has bill tabs and approve buttons for pending bills
verified_fixes.issue_4_back_navigation: BillPage.js goHome() function at line 49-53 routes based on user.role
verified_fixes.issue_5_print_calculations: BillPrintView.js shows all totals: Items Total, Subtotal, GST, Grand Total
verified_fixes.issue_6_tier_calculations: server.py get_customer_frequency calculates from actual bills not cached total_spent
verified_fixes.issue_9_mrp_print_labels: BillPrintView.js shows MRP and Discount for MRP items instead of Rate/Gold Value

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes are shown on admin dashboard instead of being sent via email/SMS
